name: quant-finance-workflow
description: Repo-local workflow and implementation skill bundle for the finance workspace in quant-data-pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local finance workflow and implementation skills
interface.longDescription: Draft local plugin that packages finance task management, Backtest UI, DB pipeline, factor, strategy, documentation sync, and candidate-refinement skills for quant-data-pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Classify and manage a finance task in this repo.
Update a finance Backtest UI, DB pipeline, factor, or strategy workflow.
Sync finance documentation after an implementation or analysis unit.
